name: Spicy Corn Rolls
recipeIngredient: Two and a half cups all-purpose flour
recipeInstructions:
If using self-rising flour, omit baking powder and salt.
Dissolve yeast in warm water in a large bowl. Stir in one-and-a-half cups of the flour, the cornmeal, buttermilk, shortening, sugar, baking powder, salt, cumin, allspice, and red pepper until smooth. Stir in remaining flour until dough forms. Turn dough onto floured surface. Knead gently about one minute or until smooth. Cover and let rise ten minutes.
Grease cookie sheet. Divide dough into twelve equal parts. Shape each part into a ball and place one inch apart on greased cookie sheet. Let rise in warm place thirty minutes.
Preheat oven to 350°F. Cut an X shape, about one-half inch deep, in the top of each roll. Bake fifteen to twenty minutes or until golden brown. Twelve rolls; 150 calories per roll.
